description.p: Makes downloading music with OrpheusDL easy on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Search multiple platforms and download high-quality audio with complete metadata.

ul.li: Cross-platform support (Windows, macOS, Linux) with easy installation
Thoughtful and modern graphical user interface
Supports all major platforms: Apple Music, Beatport, Beatsource, Deezer, Qobuz, SoundCloud, Spotify, Tidal, YouTube
Unified search across all platforms or individual search by type (track, album, playlist, artist, label)
Search and explore Dolby Atmos releases on Tidal
Search by label on Beatport and Beatsource
Advanced downloading: batch downloads (using text-file input), specific track selection, and quality options per download
Context menu integration for quick actions and source links
Comprehensive artwork support: cover thumbnails, full-size artwork view, and save/copy options
